text: Being here, I feel a quiet curiosity. The sterile, glass-encased room beyond the hall tempts with potential—an invitation to ideas unspoken, meetings yet to unfold. Moving to the next space, I am surrounded by the language of innovation and intention; the words on the wall encourage reflection and hope. There is a gentle hum of optimism, an undercurrent of wonder about the future, and the careful crafting of spaces for growth—both literal and metaphorical. I feel both small and significant within these walls, a passerby in the calm before thought takes root.
